title: Acute Bronchitis
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Acute bronchitis affects the airways in the lungs.
Diagnosis is based on symptoms and breathing exam, with testing used when needed to rule out other conditions.
Patients should seek care for worsening breathing symptoms or concern for pneumonia or other serious illness.
